sentiment.reasoning: A significant 25% revenue miss is a strong negative indicator of current business performance.

headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co misses quarterly revenue estimates by 25%

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
